---
title: "Marketing Analytics Projects"
---
<div class="card">
  <h2>📊 Analytics Work</h2>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="projects/ga4-traffic.qmd">GA4 Website Traffic Analysis</a></li>
    <li><a href="projects/reveal-presentation.qmd">Reveal.js Presentation</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>

# 📊 Marketing Analytics Projects

This section highlights my analytics work, including GA4, forecasting, segmentation, and Reveal.js storytelling.

## ✨ Projects

-   [GA4 Website Traffic Analysis](projects/ga4-traffic.qmd)
-   [Reveal.js Presentation](projects/reveal-presentation.qmd)
